name: Synergy CHC Corp.
business: Synergy CHC Corp. is a provider of consumer health care, beauty, and lifestyle products. Its two core brands are FOCUSfactor, a clinically-tested brain health supplement, and Flat Tummy, a lifestyle and wellness brand offering nutritional products for weight management. Products are sold through retailers such as Costco, Amazon.com, Walmart, Walgreens, BJ's, and The Vitamin Shoppe, as well as direct-to-consumer via brand websites.

exposures.sentence: We are a provider of consumer health care, beauty, and lifestyle products.

We also provide a Flat Tummy mobile app, which, as of December 31, 2025, had approximately 2.0 million unique downloads and is intended as a tool to promote the Flat Tummy lifestyle centered around general wellness and health.
Our products are sold through some of the nation s leading club, mass drug, and other retailers such as Costco, Amazon.com, Walmart, Walgreens, BJ s, and The Vitamin Shoppe.
Cyber incidents or attacks directed at us could result in information theft, data corruption, operational disruption and/or financial loss.

catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we introduced FOCUSfactor to Mexico.

catalysts.event: Plan to enter Taiwan and Asia
catalysts.sentence: We entered the Mexico market in the fourth quarter of 2025 and plan to enter Taiwan and Asia in 2026, initially with FOCUSfactor, followed by Flat Tummy.
The Company entered into a second amendment with its current lender during 2026 which adjusts various covenants and payment terms.

tamClaims.claim: Global nutritional supplement market expected to grow at CAGR of 9.3% from 2018 to 2028
tamClaims.sentence: The global nutritional supplement market is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 9.3% from 2018 to 2028 according to Inkwood Research.

tamClaims.claim: Global brain health supplements market estimated $8.6 billion in 2022, CAGR 13.3% 2023-2030
tamClaims.sentence: The global brain health supplements market was estimated to be $8.6 billion in 2022 and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 13.3% from 2023 to 2030, according to Grand View Research.

tamClaims.claim: Weight management market $11.3 billion global market, CAGR 4.0% 2023-2032
tamClaims.sentence: The weight management and wellbeing market, which in 2022 was estimated to be a $11.3 billion global market, with forecasted growth of 4.0% annually from 2023 to 2032, according to Business Research Insights.

tamClaims.claim: Global beverage market $176 billion in 2022, CAGR 8.6% 2022-2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to Zion Research in January 2024, the global beverage market is large ($176 billion in 2022) and growing (projected 8.6% CAGR covering eight years from 2022 through 2030).

tamClaims.claim: U.S. energy RTD sales $19.2 billion in 2023, CAGR 6.3% 2018-2023
tamClaims.sentence: U.S. sales of $19.2 billion in 2023 and a CAGR of 6.3% from 2018 to 2023, according to Euromonitor in December 2023.
